briefing: Happy Friday, March 20th! KOSPI closed at 5763.22 yesterday following a 2.73% dip amid geopolitical volatility. Semiconductor stocks are being watched for a potential rebound. Today marks the opening of 'Spectrosynthesis Seoul' at Art Sonje Center, Korea's largest queer art exhibition. Meanwhile, '20!2026 Art Seoul' continues through April 13th with its unique 80% refund policy.
